details.test: Task 1: Find nearby pharmacy store open after 8 PM and set preferred
Task 2: Create shopping list with 3 weekly-ad grocery items under $5
Task 3: Add eco-friendly laundry detergent for same-day pickup to cart
Task 4: Compare 50-inch TVs and save TV with more HDMI ports
Task 5: Find 24-hour store with bakery & café and open directions link
Task 6: Enroll in loyalty program with preferred store and interests
Task 7: Build fragrance-free cleaning shopping list under $25 for same-day pickup
Task 8: Submit contact request for in-store vacuum demo
Task 9: Locate in-store electronics return policy for standard purchases
